name: Artisan
description: You enjoy the finer crafts of life. Nothing brings you as much joy as seeing a beautifully made piece of work done by skilled hands and mind. You have come to the end of your apprenticeship, and now must find a way to carve your own work into history.

feats.name: Valuable Intuition
feats.description: You're master taught you how to recognize a scam or trap from a mile away, and when something is authentic. You have **Resolve** on skill checks when identifying the origins or magical effects of an item.
